summary.title: Shopify Checkout Pipeline Threat Model
summary.description: This threat model covers a checkout pipeline for Shopify that includes the following components: Customer browser, front - end web application, authentication services, shopping cart services, payment processing integration, order database, and external payment processor

diagrams.title: Shopify STRIDE Diagram
diagrams.description: This stride diagram covers spoofing, tampering, repudiation, information disclosure, denial of service, and elevation privelege
